name: CrowdStrike Falcon — EDR detections
description: Imports CrowdStrike Falcon endpoint detections / alerts (Falcon API /detects or /alerts export) into XORCISM as security alerts (XINCIDENT.ALERT), with the impacted endpoint linked as an ASSET and the ATT&CK tactic/technique kept as the classification. Severity is normalized from Falcon's 0-100 / Low-Critical scale. Idempotent by source+detection id. Offline: pass `file` = a Falcon detections JSON, or run with the bundled sample. Live API pulls (OAuth2 client id/secret via env) are a follow-up; this connector consumes the export.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: A CrowdStrike Falcon detections/alerts JSON export to parse
